title: Section 15
content: (1) Subject to such orders as may be made 1*** 2[*** by the State Government 3*** ] the High Court shall prepare a list of days to be observed in each year as close holidays in the Civil Courts. (2) The list shall be published in the official Gazette. (3) A judicial act done by a Civil Court on a day specified in the list shall not be invalid by reason only of its having been done on that day.
footnote: 1. The words "by the G.G. in C., in the case of the High Court at Calcutta, and " rep. by the A.O. 1937. 2. Ins. by Act 38 of 1920, s. 2 and the First Schedule. 3. The words "in other cases" rep. by the A.O. 1937.
